title: Xolby's Commands
description: A Minecraft plugin with simple commands for better gameplay.
body:
Xolby's Commands adds simple commands to make Minecraft easier:
-     /craft -> opens a portable crafting table
-     /furnace -> instantly cooks your items
-     /ec -> opens your Ender Chest
Permissions included for easy control. Perfect for quick crafting and smelting on the go!
